content:
I tried to have 10x10 and 11x11 test cases, but I hit the timeout with my solution in the IDE so I can't submit those tests...

It's weird, because it solves in about 20 seconds. The timeout on CodinGame seems to have become a lot more limited? It used to be 60 seconds... :/

Oh well, I think now I can enable Reverse mode, since it's not too hard with only 5 test cases.

Let me know if you think Reverse should be disabled.
